All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

R

refrescarCuadricula() - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Updates the visual state of every cell to reflect the current state of the model.
refrescarErroresVisuales() - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Updates the visual error state of every cell in the board by delegating to the FabricaEstilos.
RUTA_FXML - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.Main
Path of the main FXML view, relative to the resources folder.
